Name: Frequency of 'Accepted + Assigned' in variants that eventually lead to 'Completed + In Call'
Metric: Percentage of 'Accepted + Assigned' out of all 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Percentage of 'Accepted + Assigned' relative to the frequency of 'Accepted + In Progress'
Metric: Percentage of 'Accepted + Assigned' out of all 'Accepted + In Progress'

Name: Number of cases where 'Accepted + Assigned' appears more than once
Percentage of 'Accepted + Assigned' activities that are part of variants ending in 'Completed + Resolved' and 'Completed + Closed'
Metric: Percentage of 'Accepted + Assigned' out of all 'Completed + Resolved'

Name: Frequency of 'Accepted + Assigned' compared to the frequency of 'Completed + In Call'
Metric: Percentage of 'Accepted + Assigned' out of all 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Percentage of variants containing 'Accepted + Assigned' that also contain 'Accepted + Wait - User'
Metric: Percentage of 'Accepted + Assigned' out of all 'Accepted + Wait - User'

Name: Number of 'Accepted + Assigned' events occurring in cases with impact level 'High'
Metric: Number of 'Accepted + Assigned' activities == 'High' where ma is the last value of impact

Name: Percentage of 'Accepted + Assigned' that directly precedes any waiting state (e.g., 'Accepted + Wait - User', 'Accepted + Wait - Vendor', 'Accepted + Wait - Implementation', or 'Accepted + Wait')
Metric: Percentage of 'Accepted + Assigned' out of all cases

Name: Frequency of 'Accepted + Assigned' in the top 5 most frequent process variants
Percentage of all 'Accepted + Assigned' occurrences that happen before the first occurrence of 'Completed + In Call' in the same case
Metric: Percentage of 'Accepted + Assigned' out of all 'Completed + In Call'
